shell.pwaInstallHint: Install this site as an app on your device
shell.pwaInstallUnavailableBody: Your browser may already have the app installed, or install prompts are not supported here. Use your browser menu to add to home screen.
shell.pwaSidebarBody: Install prompts appear after the app meets browser checks (HTTPS, manifest, and a registered service worker). If the button stays inactive, use your browser menu → Install app or Add to Home screen.
shell.pwaSidebarBodyShort: Install when your browser offers it, or add this site from the browser menu.
shell.pwaManualIntro: If the one-tap install does not appear, use your browser menu — the app is still installable.
shell.pwaManualChrome: Chrome: ⋮ menu → Save and share → Install Waryt…
shell.pwaManualEdge: Edge: … menu → Apps → Install this site as an app
shell.pwaManualSafari: iPhone/iPad Safari: Share → Add to Home Screen
shell.pwaManualDevHint: Tip: HTTPS helps (use next dev --experimental-https or your deployed URL). Reload once after load so the service worker controls the tab.
